module simd_select.0.wasm
assert_return select_v128_i32 v128:01000000020000000300000004000000 v128:05000000060000000700000008000000 i32:1 -> v128:01000000020000000300000004000000
assert_return select_v128_i32 v128:01000000020000000300000004000000 v128:05000000060000000700000008000000 i32:0 -> v128:05000000060000000700000008000000
assert_return select_v128_i32 v128:0000803f000000400000404000008040 v128:0000a0400000c0400000e04000000041 i32:4294967295 -> v128:0000803f000000400000404000008040
assert_return select_v128_i32 v128:0000c0bf000020c0000060c0000090c0 v128:00001841000008410000f0400000d040 i32:0 -> v128:00001841000008410000f0400000d040
assert_return select_v128_i32 v128:0102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f10 v128:100f0e0d0c0b0a090807060504030201 i32:123 -> v128:0102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f10
assert_return select_v128_i32 v128:01010101010101010101010101010101 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 i32:0 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
